tasks.label: researchclaw-vla-stage-loop
args:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $topic = @'
A VLA use language prompt as memory to compress image input. The key idea is: use keyframes + language prompts to reduce image input length and augment key information, such as number, object type, and other constraints. so the VLAinput would be: images -> keyframe images + language prompts + keyframes + language prompts + keyframes. For instance, originally it needed 50 images as input, now it only uses 10, 4 in the beginning, 4 in the end, and 2 in the middle. The reduced parts are compressed using corresponding language prompts
'@; $env:RC_TOPIC = $topic; $hash = (& .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "import hashlib, os; print(hashlib.sha256(os.environ['RC_TOPIC'].encode()).hexdigest()[:6])").Trim(); $out = "artifacts\rc-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss')-$hash"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; $stages = 'TOPIC_INIT,PROBLEM_DECOMPOSE,SEARCH_STRATEGY,LITERATURE_COLLECT,LITERATURE_SCREEN,KNOWLEDGE_EXTRACT,SYNTHESIS,HYPOTHESIS_GEN,EXPERIMENT_DESIGN,CODE_GENERATION,RESOURCE_PLANNING,EXPERIMENT_RUN,ITERATIVE_REFINE,RESULT_ANALYSIS,RESEARCH_DECISION,PAPER_OUTLINE,PAPER_DRAFT,PEER_REVIEW,PAPER_REVISION,QUALITY_GATE,KNOWLEDGE_ARCHIVE,EXPORT_PUBLISH,CITATION_VERIFY'.Split(','); $warnRegex = '(?im)(Traceback|\bERROR\b|\bFAILED\b|\bWARNING\b|Warning:|Error:|degraded\s*[:=]\s*true|decision["'']?\s*[:=]\s*["'']degraded)'; Write-Host "RUN_DIR:$out"; for ($idx = 0; $idx -lt $stages.Count; $idx++) { $stage = $stages[$idx]; Write-Host "===== STAGE $($idx + 1) $stage ====="; $argsList = @('-m','researchclaw','run','--config','config.arc.yaml','--topic',$topic,'--output',$out,'--from-stage',$stage,'--to-stage',$stage,'--auto-approve'); if ($idx -gt 0) { $argsList += '--skip-preflight' }; $stageOutput = & .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe @argsList 2>&1; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; $text = ($stageOutput | Out-String); $stageOutput | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }; $logPath = Join-Path $out ("stage-{0:D2}-terminal.log" -f ($idx + 1)); $text | Set-Content -Path $logPath -Encoding UTF8; if ($exitCode -ne 0) { Write-Host "STOP_STAGE:$stage"; Write-Host "STOP_REASON:exit_$exitCode"; exit $exitCode }; if ($text -match $warnRegex) { Write-Host "STOP_STAGE:$stage"; Write-Host "STOP_REASON:terminal_warning_or_error_marker"; exit 4 } }; Write-Host "ALL_STAGES_COMPLETED:$out"

tasks.label: researchclaw-stop-stage10-pid
args: $p = 30544; if (Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host "STOPPED:$p" } else { Write-Host "NOT_RUNNING:$p" }

tasks.label: opencode-run-help
args: $cmd=(Get-Command opencode.cmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $cmd) { $cmd=(Get-Command opencode -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.CommandType -eq 'Application' } | Select-Object -First 1).Source }; & $cmd run --help

tasks.label: researchclaw-process-check
args: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*researchclaw*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*opencode*' } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | Format-Table -Wrap -AutoSize

tasks.label: researchclaw-process-check-2
args: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*researchclaw*" -or $_.CommandLine -like "*opencode*" } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | Format-Table -Wrap -AutoSize

tasks.label: stage10-process-check-inline
args: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'researchclaw run|opencode|researchclaw_vla_stage_loop' } | Select-Object ProcessId,ParentProcessId,Name,CreationDate,CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: wait-rerun-stage10-clean-process
args: $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*--from-stage CODE_GENERATION*' } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty ProcessId; if ($p) { Wait-Process -Id $p; Write-Host STAGE10_PROCESS_EXITED } else { Write-Host NO_STAGE10_PROCESS_FOUND }

tasks.label: stage17-18-marker-scan
args: $warnRegex='(?m)(Traceback|\bERROR\b|\bFAILED\b|\bWARNING\b|Warning:|Error:|Stage\s+\d+\s+(?:deep|code)\s+quality:|[Dd]egraded\s*[:=]\s*true|decision["'']?\s*[:=]\s*["'']degraded)'; foreach($n in 17,18){ $p="artifacts\rc-20260530-203953-6f0af9\stage-$('{0:D2}' -f $n)-terminal.log"; if(Test-Path $p){ $t=Get-Content $p -Raw; if($t -cmatch $warnRegex){ Write-Host "DIRTY:$p" } else { Write-Host "CLEAN:$p" } } else { Write-Host "MISSING:$p" } }
